final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand identity showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" — a fall fragrance brand (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an Eastern philosophy aesthetic with autumn warmth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, and typography specimen areas clearly separated
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the focal identity
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, contemplative autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must include autumn-inspired primary and secondary colors derived from 桂花 (osmanthus), 柿子 (persimmon), 枫叶 (maple), 乌龙茶 (oolong tea), 肉桂 (cinnamon), 檀香 (sandalwood), 琥珀 (amber)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色" as typography specimens
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve brand name "染秋" and English transliteration "RAN QIU" exactly as given; must display primary color, secondary color, and typography in distinct sections
Avoid:
